title: Bundled specs dispatch end-to-end — converge dispatch template + model resolution onto the executor's proven mechanisms (FGAP-129 + FGAP-130)
description: Iterate-to-zero continuation of TASK-103's probe findings, on the same branch (fix/fgap-127-bundled-agents-tier), per the user-approved 2026-07-08 plan. (1) pi-jit-agents resolveSpecPath (agent-spec.ts:41-46) absolutizes a relative template ref ONLY when the file exists beside the spec; otherwise the ref stays a loader-resolvable name (renderTemplateFile already loader-resolves non-absolute names) — block: sentinel and absolute inputs unchanged; substrate-local specs with adjacent templates byte-identical. (2) Both dispatch sites pass builtinDir: bundledTemplateDir() to createTemplateEnv (call-agent-tool.ts, work-order-loop.ts) — also covers the {% extends %} analyzer class. (3) New pi-agent-dispatch resolveDispatchModel(cwd, spec) implementing DEC-0023's precedence (spec.model ?? model-config.by_role[spec.role] ?? model-config.default; absent block = null); call-agent throws with a model-config-naming message when null; work-order buildDispatchArgs omits --model when null. (4) Fix pi-workflows/agents/phase-author.agent.yaml:17 malformed 'templates/' prefix. (5) Tests: end-to-end compile of bundled investigator via dispatchLoadContext + the bundled-tier env; compile of quality-analyzer (extends chain); resolveSpecPath four-shape unit; resolveDispatchModel precedence unit; buildDispatchArgs model-omission cell; phase-author parse cell. (6) Docs-surface-sync: correct the branch's overclaiming CHANGELOG bullets + dispatch-loader.ts docblock to the now-true semantics; add the dispatch resolution-tier statement to pi-agent-dispatch README; per-package CHANGELOG entries. Investigation of record: analysis/2026-07-08-bundled-spec-dispatch-template-model-divergence.md.
acceptance_criteria: Runtime demo via built dist on a fresh scratch substrate: bundled investigator compiles end-to-end (spec load → template render → CompiledAgent) and quality-analyzer compiles through its extends chain; unknown-name negative unchanged.

Model precedence observed: spec.model wins; by_role then default from the model-config block apply; with no block and no spec model, work-order buildDispatchArgs carries no --model flag and call-agent's throw names the model-config block.
Substrate-local specs with templates beside the spec resolve byte-identically to before (existence-gated absolutization); block: sentinels and absolute refs untouched.
phase-author.agent.yaml parses to a loader-resolvable ref on the workflow path.
Docs corrected: no surface claims broader dispatchability than what the runtime demo shows; README states the dispatch resolution tiers.
Full gates green; a FRESH adversarial re-probe of the complete branch diff finds nothing new (the loop's exit condition); FGAP-127/129/130 closed with honest closed_by.
